title: Methods and compositions for dental tissue repair and/or regeneration
abstract: The present invention provides methods and compositions for promoting dental tissue repair and/or regeneration, methods for promoting differentiation of dental pulp stem cells, methods for treating periodontal diseases, and methods for treating infection of a dental pulp in a subject in need thereof by contacting the tissue with a composition comprising a triacrylate capable of promoting dental pulp stem cells adhesion and/or proliferation.
claims:
Claims We claim: 1. A composition for use in dental tissue repair and/or regeneration, comprising a triacrylate capable of promoting adhesion and/or proliferation of dental pulp stem cells (DPSCs); and optionally, a scaffold. 2. The composition of claim 1, wherein the scaffold comprises a particle that encapsulates the composition. 3. The composition of claim 1, wherein the particle that encapsulates the composition is selected from the group consisting of a microsphere, a liposome, a microparticle, or combinations thereof. 4. The composition of claim 1, wherein the scaffold comprises a hydrogel. 5. The composition of claim 4, wherein the hydrogel is selected from the group consisting of collagen, alginate, polysaccharide, gelatin, chitosan, hyaluronic acid (HA), polyethylene glycol (PEG), poly(glycolide) (PGA), poly(L-lactide) (PLA), poly(lactide-co- glycolide) (PLGA), and polylactic-coglycolic acid. 6. The composition of claim 1, wherein the triacrylate is selected from the group consisting of trimethylolpropane propoxylate triacrylate, trimethylolpropane triacrylate, pentaerythritol triacrylate, trimethylolpropane ethoxylate triacrylate, succinic acid triacrylate and combinations thereof. 7. The composition of claim 1, wherein the triacrylate is trimethylolpropane propoxylate triacrylate. 8. The composition of claim 1, wherein the triacrylate is trimethylolpropane triacrylate. 9. The composition of claim 1, wherein the triacrylate is pentaerythritol triacrylate. 10. The composition of claim 1, wherein the triacrylate is trimethylolpropane ethoxylate triacrylate. 11. The composition of claim 1, wherein the triacrylate is succinic acid triacrylate. 12. The composition of claim 1, wherein the triacrylate is modified triacrylate. 13. The composition of claim 1 or 30, wherein the dental tissue is a dental pulp tissue. 34. The composition of claim 1 or 30, wherein the dental tissue is a dentin tissue. 35. The composition of claim 1 or 30, wherein the composition further promotes migration and/or differentiation of DPSCs. 36. The composition of claim 1 or 30, wherein the composition is suitable for treating a dental pulp infection. 37. The composition of claim 1 or 30, wherein the composition is suitable for delivering to a natural or artificial cavity or chamber of a tooth in a subject. 38. The composition of claim 37, wherein the composition is delivered by injection. 39. A method for promoting dental tissue repair and/or regeneration in a subject in need thereof, comprising: contacting the dental tissue with a composition comprising a triacrylate capable of promoting adhesion and/or proliferation of dental pump stem cells (DPSCs); and allowing DPSCs to adhere to the composition and/or proliferate, thereby promoting repair and/or regeneration of the dental tissue. 40. The method of claim 39, wherein the dental tissue is a dental pulp tissue. 41. The method of claim 39, wherein the dental tissue is a dentin tissue. 42. The method of claim 39, wherein the dental tissue is selected from the group consisting of a dental pulp tissue, a coronal pulp tissue, a radicular pulp tissue, a dentin tissue, a periapical tissue, a periapical connective tissue, a periodontal tissue, an accessory canal tissue, an apical foramen tissue, a foramina tissue, an odontoblastic layer, a bone tissue, a gum tissue, a blood vessel tissue, a nerve tissue, a cementum tissue, a neodentin tissue, and tissues associated with dental pulp comprising any of ameloblasts, fibroblasts, odontoblasts, histiocytes, macrophage, granulocytes mast cells or plasma cells. 43.
